matter_description: the collection of the past-due account described below
background: Our client's records show an unpaid balance of $1,262.50 for dental services provided to you between September 2025 and January 2026. Statements mailed to you on February 1, March 1, and April 1, 2026 remain unpaid.

demand_kind.detail: attorney determined the firm is acting as a debt collector regularly collecting a consumer debt owed to another (15 U.S.C. § 1692a(6); 32 M.R.S. § 11002) and that the account is a personal/family/household-purpose debt; FDCPA applicability is never inferred by the template

validation_notice_posture.detail: a 12 C.F.R. § 1006.34-compliant validation notice (Chris V. Poe1) is delivered with this letter; the letter itself is not the validation notice
